returns._0: Whether the garden has the domain enabled

initialize(address).details: This function must be called only once during contract deployment.

params._multisig: The address that will own the contract.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

proxiableUUID().details: Implementation of the ERC1822 {proxiableUUID} function. This returns the storage slot used by the implementation. It is used to validate the implementation's compatibility when performing an upgrade. IMPORTANT: A proxy pointing at a proxiable contract should not be considered proxiable itself, because this risks bricking a proxy that upgrades to it, by delegating to itself until out of gas. Thus it is critical that this function revert if invoked through a proxy. This is guaranteed by the `notDelegated` modifier.

params._capitals: An array of Capital structs associated with the action.
params._domain: The domain category for this action.
params._endTime: The end time of the action.
params._instructions: The CID JSON instructions for the action.
params._media: An array of media CIDs associated with the action.
params._startTime: The start time of the action.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

params._endTime: The new end time of the action.
params.actionUID: The unique identifier of the action to update.

params._instructions: The new instructions for the action.
params.actionUID: The unique identifier of the action to update.

params._media: The new array of media URLs to associate with the action.
params.actionUID: The unique identifier of the action to update.

params._startTime: The new start time of the action.
params.actionUID: The unique identifier of the action to update.

params._title: The new title for the action.
params.actionUID: The unique identifier of the action to update.

upgradeTo(address).details: Upgrade the implementation of the proxy to `newImplementation`. Calls {_authorizeUpgrade}. Emits an {Upgraded} event.

upgradeToAndCall(address,bytes).details: Upgrade the implementation of the proxy to `newImplementation`, and subsequently execute the function call encoded in `data`. Calls {_authorizeUpgrade}. Emits an {Upgraded} event.

gardenHasDomain(address,uint8).notice: Checks if a garden has a specific domain enabled

initialize(address).notice: Initializes the contract and sets the specified address as the owner.

registerAction(uint256,uint256,string,st.notice: Registers a new action with the specified parameters.

setGardenDomains(address,uint8).notice: Sets the domain bitmask for a garden. Callable by garden operators.

setGardenDomainsFromMint(address,uint8).notice: Sets the domain bitmask for a garden during mint. Callable by GardenToken only.

updateActionEndTime(uint256,uint256).notice: Updates the end time of an existing action.

updateActionInstructions(uint256,string).notice: Updates the instructions for an existing action.

updateActionMedia(uint256,string[]).notice: Updates the media associated with an existing action.

updateActionStartTime(uint256,uint256).notice: Updates the start time of an existing action.

updateActionTitle(uint256,string).notice: Updates the title of an existing action.
